jei.ae2lt.overload_growth.title: Overload Crystal Growth
jei.ae2lt.overload_growth.bud_growth: Overload crystal buds grow on budding overload crystal.
jei.ae2lt.overload_growth.bud_loot: Buds drop overload crystal dust when not fully grown.
jei.ae2lt.overload_growth.cluster_loot: Fully grown buds drop overload crystals.
jei.ae2lt.overload_growth.break_decay: Budding overload crystal decays when broken.
jei.ae2lt.overload_growth.silk_touch: Silk Touch prevents decay for imperfect budding overload crystal.
jei.ae2lt.overload_growth.flawless_note: Flawless budding overload crystal does not decay.
jei.ae2lt.overload_growth.getting: Charge AE2 budding certus quartz tiers in the Charger to obtain the current overload crystal tier chain.
jei.ae2lt.overload_growth.acceleration: Crystal Growth Accelerators affect overload crystal growth.
ae2lt.ponder.flawless_budding_overload_c: Use a Flawless Budding Quartz block as the core.
Place 4 Fluix Blocks on the four sides.
Place 4 Overload Crystal Blocks on the four corners.
Mount a Lightning Rod directly above the core.
Only natural lightning can complete this multiblock.
Artificial lightning from carried overload crystals is ignored.
The eight surrounding blocks are consumed, leaving the flawless budding overload crystal.
Use it to grow overload crystal buds and clusters.
